hero.title: Sculpting and elevating your beauty
hero.subtitle: Facial harmonization with artistry and care in Raul Soares, MG

about.title: Dra. Iara Tavares
about.subtitle: Dental Surgeon specializing in Facial Harmonization
about.description: Registered under CRO-MG 55.104, Dra. Iara Almeida Tavares brought the art of facial harmonization to Raul Soares and the surrounding region. Each procedure is crafted as a unique work of art, respecting natural features and enhancing the beauty that already exists in you.
about.philosophy: I believe harmonization goes beyond aesthetics — it is about restoring confidence, enhancing identity, and caring for each patient as a unique individual.

quote1.text: Every face tells a story. My work is to enhance yours.

services.title: Procedures
services.subtitle: Each treatment is personalized to enhance your natural beauty
services.cta: Wondering which procedure is right for you?

harmonizacao.name: Facial Harmonization
harmonizacao.description: A complete treatment that balances facial features, bringing harmony and proportion to the profile. Each case is individually studied for a natural and elegant result.

botox.name: Botulinum Toxin
botox.description: Smooths expression lines and dynamic wrinkles with precision, preserving the naturalness of facial expressions. A refined and rejuvenating result.

preenchimento.name: Lip Filler
preenchimento.description: Enhances lips with personalized volume and definition, bringing harmony to the face and a subtle, elegant rejuvenation.

bioestimuladores.name: Collagen Biostimulators
bioestimuladores.description: Stimulates natural collagen production, promoting skin firmness and vitality gradually and with lasting results.

lipo_papada.name: Chin Liposuction
lipo_papada.description: Reduces fat accumulation in the chin area, defining the facial contour and restoring lightness to the profile.

rinomodelacao.name: Non-surgical Rhinoplasty
rinomodelacao.description: Non-surgical nose correction with filler, adjusting proportions and smoothing imperfections without recovery time.

otomodelacao.name: Ear Reshaping
otomodelacao.description: Non-surgical correction of ear projection, with immediate and natural results. A simple procedure that transforms self-esteem.

results.title: Results
results.subtitle: Real transformations from patients who trusted Dra. Iara
results.disclaimer: Results may vary according to each patient's individual characteristics.

quote2.text: The beauty I enhance is the one that already exists in you.
